name: Biscuits and Sausage Gravy
recipeIngredient: 4 Breakfast Sausage Patties To Fit Biscuits
salt and pepper to taste -- (if salt allowed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the buttermilk biscuits according to package instructions.
2. While the biscuits are baking, cook the sausage patties. Use either Turkey Breakfast Sausage - Sage from the Meats, Poultry and Seafood section or your preferred brand. Cook until heated through, then drain excess fat on paper towels. Set aside.
3. In a clean skillet over medium-low heat, melt the margarine. Add flour and stir constantly until the mixture is smooth and golden brown, about 5 minutes.
4. Gradually whisk in the skim milk, stirring until well combined. Cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the gravy is thickened and smooth.
5. Crumble the sausage patties into the gravy and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve the gravy over warm biscuits. Serves 6.
Makes 6 servings.
